title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Puravankara International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Puravankara International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara International Enterprises:
Puravankara International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
